Regenerate: compile the inputs (with <b> as \textbf) in an 11pt article + lmodern + fullpage[empty] + 0.5in margins at \hsize 507.09 TeX pt, extract first-line end words from the PDF.

cases.input: Built and maintained a continuous integration pipeline spanning multiple repositories and delivering artifacts for authentication, validation, and facility isolation across several environments.
Implemented a provider adapter over hosted backends, normalizing model and base-URL configuration, timeouts, and JSON parsing, with a deterministic local rewriter fallback for offline work.
Forked the editor into a self-hosted resume tool, containerized with Docker and deployed to AWS EC2 behind a custom domain with HTTPS everywhere by default.
Efficient office workflows affirm difficult scaffolding effects, offering fifty affordable configuration profiles for staff efficiency and effortless afternoon handoffs.
Delivered schema-validated, section-scoped suggestions as accept/edit/discard diffs, with server-owned scoring that never grades above grounded evidence in reviews.
